results.title: ‘Airport, rail factory, jobs and tourism’: Adhir seeks PM’s help for Murshidabad
results.description: “I have repeatedly raised in the Lok Sabha the urgent necessity of establishing an airport in Murshidabad,” he said, adding that enhanced connectivity will increase trade, tourism, and investment opportunities in the district and neighbouring areas.
keywords: adhir seeks pm’s help for murshidabad
creator: avantika basu

results.title: [SMM Steel Market Morning Brief] US April PPI Up 6% YoY, Hitting a New High Since December 2022 and Exceeding Market Expectations
results.description: US April PPI was up 6% YoY, the highest since December 2022, versus expectations of 4.9%, with the prior reading revised from 4.00% to 4.3%. April PPI was up 1.4% MoM, the highest since March 2022, versus expectations of 0.5%, with the prior reading revised from 0.50% to 0.7%.

results.title: Scindia unveils ₹189.79 | DD News
results.description: The Union Minister for Development of North Eastern Region (MDoNER), Jyotiraditya Scindia, on Wednesday launched the ₹189.79-crore Mizoram Ginger Mission, a major initiative aimed at transforming the state’s GI-certified pharma-grade ginger into a globally recognised premium product through value addition, processing and export-led market integration.
